question: Show the property type descriptions of properties belonging to that code.
gold_sql: SELECT T2.property_type_description FROM Properties AS T1 JOIN Ref_Property_Types AS T2 ON T1.property_type_code  =  T2.property_type_code GROUP BY T1.property_type_code
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.property_type_description FROM ref_property_types AS T1 JOIN properties AS T2 ON T1.property_type_code = T2.property_type_code
raw_response: SELECT T1.property_type_description FROM ref_property_types AS T1 JOIN properties AS T2 ON T1.property_type_code = T2.property_type_code
